title: cousinia floccosa
intro: Cousinia floccosa, also known as woolly cousinia, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Cousinia floccosa is typically prepared in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in some herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
